'''''The Lost Prince: A Droid Adventure''''' is a [[1985]] children's-book adaptation of the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] episode entitled "[[The Lost Prince]]." It was written by [[Ellen Weiss]] and illustrated by [[Amador (artist)|Amador]].

==Plot summary==
R2-D2 and C-3PO find a new master and adventure with a lost prince in dangerous mines.

==Development==
''The Lost Prince'' is an adaptation of the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] episode [[The Lost Prince|of the same name]], which was written by [[Peter Sauder]].
